calendar.matters:
Petition For Determination Of Title Of And Require Transfer Of Property To Estate
Off Calendar Aug-25-2009 Off Calendar

Petition For Determination Of Title Of And Require Transfer Of Property To Estate
Off Calendar Apr-01-2009 Continued To Aug-25-09 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Bruce Last for Brenda Haynes (Respondent/Trustee).

Mr. Last reported that the case settled and stated that the settlement was conditional upon the sale of the house. The matter was continued to August 25, 2009 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 for status regarding the filing of a dismissal.

Judge: David L. Ballati. Reporter: Susan Lee, CSR#4280. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: T. Jackson.

Petition For Determination Of Title Of And Require Transfer Of Property To Estate
Off Calendar Jan-06-2009 Continued To Apr-01-09 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Bruce Last for and with Brenda Haynes. Garry Cohen for the Petitioner.

Mr. Cohen reported that depositions were scheduled for later this month and that additional discovery was to be conducted within the next two months. The Court asked about the possibilty of mediation. Mr. Last stated that there was a notice issue and asked about severing the 2007 amendment of the trust from the remaining issues. Mr. Cohen stated that he did not object to mediation, but that he objected to severing the matters. The Court referred the matter to Pro Bono Mediation, (signing the order for the same in open court). Mediation is to be completed by March 24, 2009. The matter was continued to April 1, 2009 for status on mediation. If the matter is not resolved, a hearing date will be set at that time.

Judge: John Dearman. Reporter: Katy Bersamin, CSR#11722. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy J. Shannon.
